## BaseDropdown.closeIfEventIsOutOfDropdown() method

Closes the dropdown if the passed event has happened on an element out of the dropdown.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
protected closeIfEventIsOutOfDropdown(event: MouseEvent | TouchEvent | FocusEvent): void;
```

## Parameters

|  Parameter | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  event | MouseEvent \| TouchEvent \| FocusEvent | The event to check if it has happen out of the dropdown component. |

<b>Returns:</b>

void
